changeSet.author: kernel-hardening
changeSet.comment: P0A-2: Backfill content references for existing documents (non-working-copy)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO content_references (id, content_id, owner_type, owner_id, active, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), d.content_id, 'DOCUMENT', d.id, true, now() FROM documents d WHERE d.content_id IS NOT NULL AND d.content_id != '' AND d.is_working_copy = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM content_references cr WHERE cr.content_id = d.content_id AND cr.owner_type = 'DOCUMENT' AND cr.owner_id = d.id )

changeSet.author: kernel-hardening
changeSet.comment: P0A-2: Backfill content references for existing working copies
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO content_references (id, content_id, owner_type, owner_id, active, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), d.content_id, 'WORKING_COPY', d.id, true, now() FROM documents d WHERE d.content_id IS NOT NULL AND d.content_id != '' AND d.is_working_copy = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM content_references cr WHERE cr.content_id = d.content_id AND cr.owner_type = 'WORKING_COPY' AND cr.owner_id = d.id )

changeSet.author: kernel-hardening
changeSet.comment: P0A-2: Backfill content references for existing versions
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO content_references (id, content_id, owner_type, owner_id, active, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), v.content_id, 'VERSION', v.id, true, now() FROM versions v WHERE v.content_id IS NOT NULL AND v.content_id != '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM content_references cr WHERE cr.content_id = v.content_id AND cr.owner_type = 'VERSION' AND cr.owner_id = v.id )
